data.title: Investors in Nidec stock urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi for claims, insinuating significant losses.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced substantial losses in Nidec to reach out to him for a consultation on their potential legal actions. If you are one of the investors who suffered notable losses in Nidec stock or options, connect with Wilson directly to explore the available avenues.

data.title: Teachers Federal Credit Union donates $50,000 during its 2025 Season of Giving to support various charities.
data.description: The Season of Giving in 2025 is backing Johns Hopkins All Children's Hospital, Long Island Cares, Inc., and Paws of War in Hauppauge, New York. Teachers Federal Credit Union, a major credit union in the U.S. holding over $9.9 billion in assets, is spearheading this initiative, aiming to make a positive impact in the community.

data.title: Wide Bandgap Semiconductor Market to reach USD 4.66 Billion by 2032 at 12.6% CAGR, driven by demand in EVs and 5G.
data.description: The Wide Bandgap Semiconductor Market is experiencing significant growth as the demand for energy-efficient power devices surges across various sectors. This includes electric vehicles, renewable energy systems, fast chargers, data centers, and 5G infrastructure. Key materials driving this growth are silicon carbide (SiC) and gallium nitride. The market is currently valued at approximately $X billion and is expected to reach around $Y billion by 20ZZ. This growth is propelled by the increasing adoption of advanced technologies for power electronics and the shift towards sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Next Gen Diagnostics launches NGD Infection Prevention on Jan 1, 2026 to focus on real-time genomic transmission detection.
data.description: Today, Next Gen Diagnostics (NGD) from Cambridge, Massachusetts disclosed that on January 1st, they will be separating their Infection Prevention division to form a new independent entity named NGD Infection Prevention. This new company will concentrate on utilizing real-time genomic transmission techniques.

data.title: Vow ASA's chairman buys 400,000 shares at 2.58 NOK per share; company associated with chairman sells 310,000 shares.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Thomas Fredrick Borgen, the chairman of Vow ASA (OSE: VOW), a primary insider, acquired 400,000 shares in the company at a price of 2.58 NOK per share. Simultaneously, Tfbconsulting AS, a company linked to Borgen, sold 310,000 shares in Vow ASA at the same price of 2.58 NOK per share.

data.title: Trump celebrates as U.S. economy sees 4.3% Q3 growth, defying expectations. Analysts skeptical of sustainability.
data.description: The U.S. economy grew by 4.3% in the third quarter, sparking debates among economists and politicians. President Trump hailed the growth, attributing it to his economic policies and tariffs. The GDP growth exceeded expectations of 3.3% and was the strongest since late 2023. Trump claimed that consumer spending was strong, net exports were up, trade deficits were down, and there was no inflation. Wall Street economists, however, raised concerns about the sustainability of the economic boom. Trump touted the success as a "Trump Economic Golden Age" due to tax cuts and tariffs. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Perpetual futures are now 68% of Bitcoin trading volume in 2025 and set prices based on funding rates, reshaping market behavior.
data.description: Perpetual futures, or "perps," were once considered risky due to high leverage and volatility but have now become a crucial part of crypto liquidity. In 2025, perps account for 68% of all Bitcoin trading volume, while spot markets make up less than a third. Perps no longer follow prices, they set them. However, challenges remain for perps to be recognized as financial infrastructure. Perps work by being futures contracts without expiry dates, trading through funding rates. Their integration into market plumbing and lingering issues are hindering broader acceptance. Perps have changed the market's core mechanics by signaling market mood through funding rates and influencing price movements. More details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Shrub Oak International School holds Winter Art & Music Showcase for autistic students, celebrating creativity.
data.description: In Mohegan Lake, New York, on December 23, 2025, Shrub Oak International School organized its Winter Student Showcase. The event highlighted the talents of autistic students aged from children to young adults. Shrub Oak is a renowned therapeutic day and residential program.

data.title: Raytheon (RTX) secures $1.7B missile defense contract from Spain for 4 Patriot systems. Details include working with Spanish firms.
data.description: RTX Corporation announced that its business arm, Raytheon, secured a $1.7 billion contract to supply Spain with four Patriot air and missile defense systems. The contract includes collaboration with Spanish defense companies like Sener for the electro-mechanical control system of the GEM-T missile. The Patriot system, known for its effectiveness globally, offers defense against various threats including long-range cruise missiles, tactical ballistic missiles, and air-breathing threats. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
